mapper.select: SELECT GOAL.goal_id, GOAL.user_id, GOAL.goal_title, GOAL.goal_content, GOAL.start_date, GOAL.target_date, GOAL.end_date, GOAL.category_id, GOAL.reg_id, GOAL.reg_dt, GOAL.mod_id, GOAL.mod_dt FROM tb_goal GOAL WHERE goal_id = #{goalId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_goal( goal_id, user_id, goal_title, goal_content, start_date, target_date, category_id, reg_id, reg_dt, mod_id, mod_dt ) VALUES( #{goalId}, #{userId}, #{goalTitle}, #{goalContent}, #{startDate}::date, #{targetDate}::date, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, now(), #{userId}, now() ) ON CONFLICT (goal_id) DO UPDATE SET goal_title = EXCLUDED.goal_title, goal_content = EXCLUDED.goal_content, start_date = EXCLUDED.start_date, target_date = EXCLUDED.target_date, category_id = EXCLUDED.category_id, mod_id = #{userId} mod_dt = now() ;
mapper.select: SELECT item_id, goal_id, user_id, item_title, item_content, item_frequency, reg_id, reg_dt, mod_id, mod_dt FROM public.tb_goal_item WHERE goal_id = #{goalId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_goal_item( item_id, goal_id, user_id, item_title, item_content, item_frequency, reg_id, reg_dt, mod_id, mod_dt ) VALUES( #{itemId}, #{goalId}, #{userId}, #{itemTitle}, #{itemContent}, #{itemFrequency}, #{userId}, now(), #{userId}, now() ) ON CONFLICT (goal_id, item_id) DO UPDATE SET item_title = EXCLUDED.item_title, item_content = EXCLUDED.item_content, item_frequency = EXCLUDED.item_frequency, mod_id = #{userId} mod_dt = now()
